title: Scent and Spirit

Wisplet leaves soft spirit-light breadcrumbs in air; Mossprig and Thornling follow.
Mira running with lantern, satchel bouncing; determined, not angry.

bubbles.text: I'm not reclaiming property. I'm answering a runaway invitation.

dialogue.text: I'm not reclaiming property. I'm answering a runaway invitation.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 13/25 — Scent and Spirit. Story purpose: Bramblefox tracks; Wisplet senses spiritual trail; Mira follows. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p13a): Bramblefox nose to disturbed leaves and cyan-gold mote residue. Panel 2 (p13b): Wisplet leaves soft spirit-light breadcrumbs in air; Mossprig and Thornling follow. Panel 3 (p13c): Mira running with lantern, satchel bouncing; determined, not angry. Characters: mira-eggwarden. Creatures: bramblefox, wisplet, mossprig, thornling. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: dawn. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"spark":{"position":"ahead toward stone arch","glow":"intermittent"},"tracking":"companion-led"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
artAlt: Scent and Spirit — Spark's Journey page 13
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): I'm not reclaiming property. I'm answering a runaway invitation.
